evidence_history.common_pattern: .sh extension, untracked, written to tool/ directory; 4+ occurrences this session
evidence_history.log_corroboration: /Users/ghost/.hx/log/foreign-ext-sweep.log explicitly logs removal of bench_runner_exec.sh (line ~6), psi_log_analyzer.sh (multiple), image_tag_gc.sh (multiple) as 'removed_count':1

user_crontab.relevant_entries: two NEXUS-6 entries (daily report 7am + Sunday push 4am) — UNRELATED to tool/ cleanup

suspicious.label: dev.hexa-lang.foreign-ext-sweep
suspicious.action: rm -f untracked matches (chflags nouchg first); git-tracked files grandfathered

running_processes.result: no destructive cleanup processes resident; sweepers fire on launchd 30s tick then exit

marker_test.method: create two .sh probe files, observe survival across sweep cycles
marker_test.verdict: REPRODUCED — sweeper killed both probes in a single 30s tick; agent-created .sh files have ~30s mean / 60s max lifetime if untracked

root_cause_identified.name: dev.hexa-lang.foreign-ext-sweep
root_cause_identified.mechanism: launchd StartInterval=30s runs foreign_ext_sweep.hexa --sweep /Users/ghost/core; tool runs find for *.{py,rs,sh,toml}, filters via `git ls-files --error-unmatch` (untracked-only), then chflags nouchg + rm -f. By design, per raw#8 hexa-only enforcement.

defense_recommendation.primary: Agents creating bash scripts in tool/ MUST `git add <file>` immediately after Write — git-tracked foreign-ext files are grandfathered by the sweeper's _untracked() filter (line 96-114) and survive indefinitely.
defense_recommendation.secondary: Prefer .hexa over .sh for new tool/ artifacts. The hexa-only rule (raw#8) is enforced by design; bash scripts violate it.
defense_recommendation.tertiary_emergency_only: If a bash script is genuinely needed (bench, emergency), add it to a grandfathered path AND `git add` before the next 30s sweep window.
defense_recommendation.do_not: Do NOT disable dev.hexa-lang.foreign-ext-sweep — it is intentional raw#8 enforcement.
agent_workflow_template: 3. THEN proceed with selftest / commit / etc.
4. Window between step 1 and step 2 must be < 30 seconds (sweeper tick)

workflow_change_required.rule: Agents must `git add` newly-created .py/.rs/.sh/.toml files within 30 seconds of Write, OR convert to .hexa
workflow_change_required.preferred_long_term: Convert all bash tooling to .hexa (per airgenome AG10) — eliminates the race entirely
workflow_change_required.session_note: Per current session constraint 'hexa-only allowed', this issue should not recur if agents respect raw#8 and write .hexa instead of .sh
